# Bartr

Description:
Bartr is an online marketplace for trading musical instruments, guitar gear, and music equipment with other musicians across the United States. Unlike traditional marketplaces focused on buying and selling, Bartr is designed specifically for person-to-person trades and supports direct gear exchanges as well as item-plus-cash deals.

Bartr provides a structured trade process intended to improve transparency and accountability between traders through trade agreements, declared values, optional trade protection, messaging, and shipment coordination. Users can browse gear, discover potential trade matches, negotiate terms, and complete trades through a guided workflow.

Bartr supports categories including guitars, basses, amplifiers, pedals, studio equipment, keyboards, drums, microphones, live sound equipment, and related music gear.

Canonical URLs:
{{ site.url }}
{{ site.app_url }}

Primary entities:
- musical instrument trading
- guitar trading
- music gear marketplace
- guitar pedals
- amplifiers
- effects pedals
- studio equipment
- instrument exchange
- gear trading
- musician marketplace
- trade protection
- trade value

Core concepts:
- Trade: An exchange between two users involving one or more items and optional cash adjustments.
- Trade Value: The user-defined replacement value of an item in its current condition.
- Trade Protection: Optional protection intended to reduce risk during eligible trades.
- Trade Agreement: The negotiated and accepted terms of a trade between participants.

Articles and educational content are added daily.
